summary: The rep successfully booked an appointment for the prospect, addressing initial concerns about the booking date and deposit process. She clearly explained the steps for confirmation and showed empathy when the prospect expressed hesitation. The call ended with a confirmed appointment and an acknowledgment of the prospect's interest in additional services.
try_this: On your next call, actively listen for any signs of hesitation or distrust, even subtle ones. When you hear them, immediately offer clear reassurance and take ownership of the solution, just like this rep did by saying, "No worries, you have my word, sir." Follow up by clearly outlining the next steps and confirming how they will receive their booking details.
why_it_worked: This call scored high because the rep masterfully built trust by actively reassuring the prospect and taking full ownership of the booking process. When the prospect expressed hesitation about the booking system and even mentioned "scams on Facebook," the rep didn't just answer questions; she proactively addressed his underlying distrust with phrases like, "No worries, you have my word, sir," and immediately started processing his information "as we speak." She also provided clear, actionable next steps and confirmation timelines, ensuring the prospect felt secure and informed throughout the entire interaction.
